# Cove Blades

> Professional knife and cutlery sharpening service in Vancouver, BC, Canada.

## About
Cove Blades provides mobile and drop-off knife sharpening services across Metro Vancouver and the Lower Mainland. Based in North Vancouver, we serve homes, restaurants, and businesses. Founded in 2020.

## Services
- Mobile knife sharpening (we come to you)
- 24/7 secure drop-off box at 4086 Brockton Crescent, North Vancouver
- Restaurant scheduled sharpening (weekly/bi-weekly)
- Blade repair, handle tightening, rust removal

## Pricing
- Standard kitchen knife: $12
- Japanese knife (single bevel): $18
- Ceramic knife: $18
- Kitchen scissors: $12/pair
- 30-day edge guarantee on every sharpening

## Service Area
North Vancouver, Vancouver, Burnaby, West Vancouver, Coquitlam, and surrounding Lower Mainland communities.

## Contact
- Phone: 604-210-8180
- Email: info@coveblades.com
- Website: https://coveblades.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/coveblades
- Facebook: https://facebook.com/coveblades

## Hours
- Monday–Friday: Noon–7:00 PM
- Saturday: Noon–4:00 PM
- Drop Box: 24/7
